headline: Public.com unveils Agentic Brokerage — AI executes trades, builds portfolios, and generates research autonomously
summary: Public.com launched its Agentic Brokerage Suite — a three-layer architecture where AI agents handle Research (market analysis, SEC filings), Creation (portfolio construction, strategy design), and Action (autonomous trade execution) layers. The platform processes over 2,500 AI-generated assets in its first month of operation and achieves sub-500ms execution latency. With $12B in assets under management, Public is positioning itself as the first retail brokerage where investors delegate the full investment workflow to AI agents rather than just receiving recommendations.

key_stat.label: AI-generated assets created in first month
